title: Design a 2D educational puzzle game template
description: Create a complete Game Design Document for a 2D educational puzzle game template that teachers can customize. Include: game mechanic-to-learning-objective mapping, Bevy ECS architecture (sprites, tilemaps, UI), asset manifest, color palette with WCAG contrast ratios, and cognitive load estimates. The template should work for any K-12 subject.
verify_commands: test -f docs/game_templates/2d_puzzle_gdd.md && echo 'GDD exists' || echo 'GDD missing'
notes: Artist quest. Design for the XR game economy — this template will be reusable by teachers. Include Dumpster Universe lore hooks.
